steps.t: Bíralad wants to treat the scouts of Sâr Marsag to a new meal and has asked you to gather crocodile meat and mushrooms from the Lair of the Shadlúgai …
You have gathered mushrooms and crocodile meat that Bíralad needed for his recipe from the Lair of the Shadlúgai. Return to him in Sâr Marsag.
